name: Diabetic Health Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the raisins, dates, and apples in water for 3 minutes.
2. Melt the vegetable shortening and let it cool.
3. Add the cooled shortening to a bowl with the beaten eggs, Sweet 'n low, vanilla, baking soda, flour, and chopped nuts.
4. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow the cookies to cool completely before storing them in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
